summary: Completed comprehensive testing of AidAssist hearing aid troubleshooting app. Backend APIs are 100% functional with excellent LLM integration (GPT-5.2). Critical frontend session persistence issue prevents complete E2E testing.

minor_issues.issue: PDF response cannot be parsed as JSON in test (binary content)
minor_issues.impact: Test parsing only - PDF generation works correctly

critical_bugs.issue: User session not persisting after successful signup/login - users get redirected back to signup page
critical_bugs.impact: Prevents access to dashboard and troubleshooting flow - blocks core functionality

integration_issues.issue: Cannot test end-to-end troubleshooting due to session persistence issue

action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix frontend session persistence issue. Users can signup successfully but get immediately logged out and redirected to signup page, preventing access to dashboard and core troubleshooting functionality. Backend authentication APIs work perfectly, so this appears to be a frontend token storage or authentication context issue.
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (12/12 APIs working), Frontend: 70% (core UI working but session persistence failing)
